---
title: "Title"
subtitle: "Subtitle"
author: "Group RGB"
institute: "CASA0023 Remotely Sensing Cities and Environments"
date: "2026/03/09 (updated: `r Sys.Date()`)"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
---
